title: [ExportVerilog quality] read_inout causing silly wires to get emitted

features.name: read from inout wire creates unnecessary intermediate wire
features.description: Code should include reading from an inout wire followed by a wire assignment that copies the entire inout value, producing unnecessary intermediate wire

features.name: bit select from wire copy creates unnecessary intermediate wire
features.description: Code should include a bit select operation performed on an intermediate wire that was itself created by copying another wire, producing unnecessary wire chain

features.name: reg to wire copy followed by bit selects
features.description: Code should include a register value being copied to a wire, followed by bit select operations on that wire, creating unnecessary wire copies in the emitted verilog
